author.bio: Filecoin is a data storage network backed by an application token. The Filecoin token sale ended in September 2017. Sites purporting to sell Filecoin are SCAMS.
author.name: Filecoin

content.text: 🎉 go-filecoin Demos 🖥 Filecoin Roadmap 🗺 Research Update 🌟and more!  Read the Filecoin Q1 & Q2 Update here https://filecoin.io/blog/update-2018-q1-q2/
